Billing

How money owed by a customer is calculated and when it may be written off.

Invoice totals

Totals are summed by InvoiceService. Rounding is never applied per line — only once, at the end.

CaseRule
Zero-amount lineKept in the invoice, excluded from the total
Credit noteRecorded as a negative line, never as a separate document

Write-offs

A debt below the write-off threshold is closed automatically at the end of the quarter.
